results.title: ROSEN, TOP RANKED GLOBAL COUNSEL, Encourages GeneDx Holdings Corp. Investors to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action - WGS
results.description: NEW YORK, July 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WHY: Rosen Law Firm, a global investor rights law firm, reminds purchasers of common stock of GeneDx Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: WGS) between April 16, 2025 and May 4, 2026, inclusive (the “Class Period”), of the important August 3, 2026 lead plaintiff deadline.

results.title: Congress’ Ethanol U-turn and the Opposition’s credibility crisis
results.description: Politics often thrives on selective memory. What is defended in government is frequently denounced in opposition. results.title: Why BTS agreed to perform at the FIFA World Cup 2026 halftime show without getting paid? Here's why it's more than a paycheck
results.description: BTS will headline the FIFA World Cup 2026 final halftime show without an appearance fee, supporting the FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund. The performance aligns with the group's charitable values, offers unmatched global exposure, marks FIFA history's first halftime show, highlights their reunion after military service, and adds another milestone to their legacy alongside global music icons.

results.title: Milwaukee Brewers select Florida OF Kyle Jones in 2026 MLB Draft
results.description: Florida outfielder Kyle Jones was selected by the Milwaukee Brewers with the No. 102 overall pick in the 2026 MLB Draft. Jones spent his freshman season at Stetson, where he was named an NCBWA Second Team Freshman All-American.

results.title: Orienspace Readies Gravity-1 for First Commercial Satellite Cluster Launch
results.description: Gravity-1 rocket launch marks Orienspace's first commercial mission as China's largest solid-fuel orbital vehicle targets a Yellow Sea barge liftoff no earlier than July 12, aiming to deploy approximately 30 satellites for a single constellation customer, in a milestone test of sea-launched solid-propellant batch delivery.
